milestones.title: Package Roots, Search Paths, Cache, And Build Graph
CLI And Public Entry Point Migration
Fixture Migration And Self-Boot Readiness Evidence

directions.summary: Create or designate one internal package/module owner and migrate current `.mlfp` checking/runtime preparation to depend on it.
preconditions: Inspect current parsed/resolved program types, module resolver, checker, Prelude injection, CLI preparation, public pipeline adapters, and current single-file fixtures at HEAD.
parallel_hints: Serial foundation work; do not fan out until the owner boundary is selected.

directions.summary: Teach the package owner to discover source files, build the module graph, topologically order checks, and report missing/cyclic modules.
preconditions: Inspect module import cycle handling, parser source-span handling, CLI file IO, test program fixtures, and current diagnostics.
parallel_hints: Serial with interface work until discovery semantics are stable.

directions.summary: Introduce the interface representation and validation boundary used by package imports and later separate compilation.
preconditions: Inspect resolved symbol identity docs, import/export resolution, data/class/instance metadata, and existing public surface tests.
parallel_hints: Serial after milestone 2; schema docs and fixture drafting may split only with disjoint ownership.

directions.summary: Add package root/search path semantics and deterministic build graph invalidation around source and interface artifacts.
preconditions: Inspect CLI commands, test helpers, temporary artifact handling, current module dependency docs, and native/backend preparation.
parallel_hints: Serial with CLI migration; cache-specific tests can be extracted separately after package roots are fixed.

directions.summary: Route CLI and public package-facing adapters through package mode and preserve current examples as trivial packages.
preconditions: Inspect app/Main.hs, MLF.Program.CLI, MLF.Backend.Emission.Prepare, src-public/MLF/API.hs, src-public/MLF/Pipeline.hs, and CLI/backend tests.
parallel_hints: CLI adapter and docs/fixture migration may split only after package owner APIs are stable.

directions.summary: Finish fixture/docs migration and record exactly what remains before compiler-in-`.mlfp` implementation can begin.
preconditions: Inspect README, docs/mlfp-language-reference.md, docs/syntax.md, fixture directories under test/programs, parity policy, and any package CLI docs added by prior milestones.
parallel_hints: Docs and fixture updates can split after package CLI/API behavior is green.

milestone-4-status.selector: ### [done] 4. Package Roots, Search Paths, Cache, And Build Graph

milestone-5-status.selector: ### [pending] 5. CLI And Public Entry Point Migration

milestone-6-status.selector: ### [pending] 6. Fixture Migration And Self-Boot Readiness Evidence
